title: Government of Canada Invests to Modernize Ontarioâ€™s Electricity Grid, Ensuring More Reliable Power for Ontarians
content: Canada has announced over $13 million in federal funding for five clean energy projects in Ontario aimed at modernizing electricity systems. The funding, delivered through the Energy Innovation Programâ€™s Smart Grids Demonstration Call, will support projects that integrate renewables, hydrogen, nuclear, geothermal, and biofuels into provincial grids. The initiatives will enable customer-owned devices like solar panels and batteries to participate in electricity markets, lowering energy costs while making grids smarter, more resilient, and sustainable.
author: Analysts Account
